title: The Killer Robots! Crash and Burn
original_title: The Killer Robots! Crash and Burn
overview: Four fallen robot gladiators are rescued from the scrap pile, turned into an elite group of mercenaries and sent on a mission to bring about a new age of enlightenment in a post-apocalyptic universe.
